summary: A Go-based CLI tool that migrates Goss tests, detects infrastructure configurations, and runs assertions with OpenTelemetry tracing support.
concerns: Heavy reliance on Goss migration suggests legacy coupling
Plugin directory lacks clear structure or typed interfaces
Multiple config directories (.claude, .gorchestra, .github) may cause fragmentation
No visible dependency injection framework for complex internal wiring
suggestions: Finalize and deprecate the Goss migration path to reduce maintenance burden
Document the plugin API and provide typed Go interfaces for plugin authors
Consolidate configuration management across the scattered config directories
Expand OpenTelemetry coverage beyond the runner to detector and reporter modules
